```{=html}
<div class="conference-card{{#if award}} award{{/if}}">
  {{#if award}}
  <div class="conference-badge award">🏆 {{award}}</div>
  {{/if}}
  <div class="conference-content">
    <h3>{{title}}</h3>
    <p><strong>{{authors}}</strong></p>
    <p><em>{{conference}}</em><br>
    {{organization}}, {{date}}</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
